name: ASUS TUF GAMING A520M-PLUS WIFI Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD A520 Chipset - Supports DDR4-4866(OC) - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 1x M.2 Socket3 - D-Sub - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.- USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-A - Gigabit LAN - 802.11ac Wi-Fi
